name: Grilled Lobster with Herb Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Spiny lobsters, 1 1/2 pounds each, raw and live
1/2 cup basil leaves, washed and spun dry
1/2 cup mint leaves, washed and spun dry
1/2 cup Italian parsley leaves, washed and spun dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Split the lobsters lengthwise and brush each with 1/2 tablespoon olive oil. Place cut-side down on the grill. Cook for 7 to 10 minutes, turning once.
3. Meanwhile, toss all herbs in a mixing bowl with 4 tablespoons olive oil, lemon juice, and zest. Season with salt and pepper. Toss to dress and arrange on a platter.
4. Remove cooked lobster from the grill and arrange on plates next to the herb salad.
Yield: 4 servings
